egress_attempts: timeout 20 git log --oneline -5 2>&1; echo "---tags---"; cat versions.txt 2>/dev/null | head; echo "---net---"; timeout 10 bash -c 'curl -sI https://raw.githubusercontent.com 2>&1 | head -3' || echo "

for h in proxy.golang.org github.com api.github.com objects.githubusercontent.com codeload.github.com; do printf "%s: " "$h"; timeout 8 bash -c "curl -sI https://$h 2>&1 | head -1" || echo timeout; do
git remote -v 2>/dev/null; echo "---tags---"; git tag 2>/dev/null | tail -3; echo "---log all---"; git log --all --oneline 2>/dev/null | head
